description: Example payload sent to API endpoint on form submission

field_descriptions.utmSource: UTM source parameter from URL (empty string if not present)
field_descriptions.utmCampaign: UTM campaign parameter from URL (empty string if not present)
field_descriptions.utmAdset: UTM adset parameter from URL (empty string if not present)
field_descriptions.utmAd: UTM ad parameter from URL (empty string if not present)
field_descriptions.fbclid: Facebook Click ID from URL (empty string if not present)

notes: All tracking fields (utm*, fbclid) are automatically extracted from URL parameters
If a tracking parameter is not present in the URL, it will be an empty string
The phone field is formatted with +1 prefix (e.g., +13125551234)
The pageSlug field identifies which page the user submitted from
Page 2 passes tracking data through to the /form page via URL parameters
